function.name: get_route_distance
function.description: Calculate driving distance between two city names or addresses.
function.long_description: First resolves location names to geographic coordinates using the Open-Meteo Geocoding API, then calculates the driving distance using the OSRM road network service.

start_location.description: The starting city or address (e.g., 'London' or '1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA')

example_user_queries: How far is the drive from New York to Los Angeles?
Calculate the road distance between Berlin and Munich.
What is the driving distance from London to Edinburgh?
Use get_route_distance to find the distance from Tokyo to Osaka.
Check the road distance between Seattle and Vancouver.
